message:
fix(matrix): correct status classifications, add modules, dedup symbols

- Reclassify 4 dlsym-delegating symbols from Implemented to GCT:
  __inet_aton_exact, __inet_pton_length, __inet6_scopeid_pton,
  obstack_vprintf
- Add 3 missing GCT symbols found in code but absent from matrix:
  __gconv_get_cache, __gconv_get_modules_db,
  __resolv_context_get_override
- Add module field to 230 symbols that lacked it (enriched from
  source field or code analysis)
- Remove 3 duplicate symbol entries (error, error_at_line,
  fwrite_unlocked)
- Update counts: total=3980, Implemented=3388, RawSyscall=406,
  GCT=186
- Validation improved from 81% to 86% valid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
